title: [skip ci]Introduce how to start to hack on libpod.
body:
Introduce a new part inside the contribution guide who explain how to start to hack on libpod:
- setup environment
- install tools
- using make
- building podman
- test your changes locally

Signed-off-by: Hervé Beraud <hberaud@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
bot, add author to whitelist

**tip**: Since what you're doing here (docs updates, thanks!) isn't really covered by anything in CI (unless you want to add a spelling check :smile:), you can bypass it by adding ``[skip ci]`` at the beginning of the PR title.
